---
id: mute-group-members
title: "MuteGroupMembers"
description: "通过该接口可以禁言或解禁群组内的特定成员。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/group/open-api-desc
date: "2026-07-08"
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>MuteGroupMembers</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过该接口可以禁言或解禁群组内的特定成员。

接口调用成功后，群组内全体用户通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，得知哪些群成员无法在该群组发言或解除禁言状态：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|-------|-------|
| [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmemberinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmemberinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|---------|-----|---------|---------|
| [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|-----------|
| [OnGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">参数 `FromUserId` 和 `UserId` 对应的用户已在客户端调用 `login` 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册。</Note>

<Note title="说明">参数 FromUserId 和 UserIds 仅支持数字，英文字符和 `'!','#','$','%','&','(',')','+','\'',':',';','<','=','.','>','?',
'@','[',']','^','_','{','}','|','~'`。</Note>

<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=MuteGroupMembers\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["MuteGroupMembers"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"FromUserId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"操作用户 ID（已在客户端调用 login 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）。\n\n> **说明**\n>\n> 由于禁言操作会触发群 tips 消息，因此当 FromUserId 不是群组成员时，开发者需要隐藏该消息或实现其他处理，避免群内用户产生困惑。\n","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"operator_user"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"GroupId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"群组 ID。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"group123"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"UserIds","in":"query","required":true,"description":"禁言或解禁群成员用户 ID 列表，单次请求最多传入 20 个用户 ID。","schema":{"type":"array","maxItems":20,"items":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"user1"}},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Duration","in":"query","required":false,"description":"禁言时长，不传默认为 0。\n- -1：永久。\n- 0：取消禁言。\n- 大于 0：禁言时长，单位为秒。最大支持 30 天（2592000 秒）。\n\n若在某位群用户的禁言有效期内，再次调用本接口更新禁言时长，则以该请求时刻起重新计算禁言时间。\n","schema":{"type":"number","minimum":-1,"maximum":2592000,"example":3600}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>OK</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的 Code 和 SubCode ，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>Code / SubCode</th><th>说明</th><th>处理建议</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000001</td><td>业务类通用错误。</td><td>请重试，或联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>参数错误。</td><td>请检查请求参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300005</td><td>调用接口的频率超出了 AppID 级别限制。</td><td>请稍后再试。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600001</td><td>群组不存在。</td><td>请确认传入的 GroupID 是否正确。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600009</td><td>获取群相关信息失败。</td><td>请先确认 GroupID 是否正确。如果正确，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600024</td><td>FromUserId 不在群内。</td><td>请检查  FromUserId 或 或添加 FromUserId 为群成员。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600032</td><td>FromUserId 没权限。</td><td>FromUserId 需为群主或管理员。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600033</td><td>全部指定用户操作均失败。</td><td>请检查 UserIds。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ErrorUsers</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>失败用户列表。<ul><li>Code 为 0：</li><li>ErrorUsers 为空，全部指定用户禁言/解禁成功。</li><li>ErrorUsers 不为空，表示部分指定用户禁言/解禁失败，请参考 SubCode 处理。</li><li>Code 不为 0：</li><li>ErrorUsers 为空，表示参数错误、接口频率限制、系统错误。</li><li>ErrorUsers 不为空，表示全部指定用户禁言/解禁失败。</li></ul></div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"失败用户 ID。"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SubCode"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"失败的具体返回码。完整返回码请参考 Code 说明或者 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n"}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\",\n  \"ErrorUsers\": [\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"string\",\n      \"SubCode\": 0\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
